items.name: Spec Beta Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: In 2113, decades after the initial release of the hugely successful Spec Alpha biograft energy weapons, the US government began research on a top-secret upgrade. The breakthrough was to use artificial diamonds to forge the blade itself, rather that carbon nanofibers. The new weapon was very effective, but obscenely expensive. Only a hundred were ever made.

items.name: All Hallow's Sword
items.description: Slash at your foes and deal 15 damage per hit.  If you're looking to do something a little more interesting - hit 'Q' to grow vines that will stun and trap anyone within a 15 stud radius.  The 'E' key will shoot 10 vines in front of you to hit your opponents - doing  12 damage. Finally - press the 'X' key  to activate a vine like shield, which arises from the ground and surrounds you for 20 seconds. It does 20 damage to anyone who runs into it.

items.name: Gucci Queen Elizabeth Gorget x Achille Lauro (3.0)
items.description: Gorget detailed with a GG pattern that was worn on stage by Achille Lauro during the last night of Sanremo 2020 as he performed his song "Me ne frego." The item co-designed by Achille Lauro and Alessandro Michele pays homage to Queen Elizabeth Tudor I. Item creation supervised by Rook Vanguard. This is a collectible item. Item created for 3.0 avatars woman/man.
